feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to use recursive query in SQL Views in SAP Datasphere?
entry.content: I need to write a query to find the hierarchical data for manager / employee data, but Datasphere throws an error with the 'with' clause while writing cte's. Can anyone please tell me how to use recursive query in SQL Views in SAP Datasphere?

entry.title: Request for Solution: CDS View with Parameters (Key Date) Not Supported in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are currently integrating a consumption CDS view with SAP Datasphere. This view includes parameters used for Key Date calculations. However, it appears that parameter-based CDS views are currently not supported in Datasphere, and as a result, these views are not visible or accessible within Datasphere.

Current Architecture:

  • Source: SAP S/4HANA CDS Views (with parameters)
  • Data Layer: SAP Datasphere
  • Cloud Storage: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
  • Reporting Tool: Qlik Sense

Issue Description:

Due to the use of parameters (specifically for Key Date logic), the CDS views are not visible in Datasphere. To work around this, we attempted to create a wrapper CDS view to eliminate parameters by replacing the Key Date with the current system date ($systemDate). However, this approach does not yield the correct results. While it retrieves data until the current date, it fails to calculate key figures as expected based on Key Date logic.

Request for Guidance:

  1. Is there any supported approach in SAP Datasphere for handling CDS views with Key Date parameters?
  2. Are there alternative solutions or best practices in S/4HANA or Datasphere to handle such cases?
  3. Would it be possible to implement the Key Date logic in GCP?
    • If so, what changes or configurations would be required on the S/4HANA side to support this?
  5. Are there any recommended design patterns or tools to replicate the Key Date functionality in an environment where parameterized views are not supported?

This issue is critical and is currently impacting key project deliverables. Your urgent assistance would be highly appreciated.

Please find attached the CDS views in question, including those with parameters. Let us know if you need any additional details.

Thanks,

Sridhar

entry.title: Transformation Mapping IPS Groups to SAP Datasphere Profiles
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m currently working on setting up a transformation mapping between an IPS group and SAP Datasphere.
Here is the transformation code I’m using:

{
                "condition": "$.groups[?(@.display == 'GLB APP SAP IAS_DEV BTP Datasphere DEV TESTSCIM')] != []",
                "constant": {
                    "value": "PROFILE:t.MGQALN:EK_SR_P_WORKSHOP",
                    "display": "EK_SR_P_WORKSHOP",
                    "primary": true
                },
                "targetPath": "$.roles[0]"
            },
            {
                "condition": "$.groups[?(@.display == 'GLB APP SAP IAS_DEV BTP Datasphere DEV TESTSCIM_ADMIN')] != []",
                "constant": {
                    "value": "PROFILE:sap.dwc:Data_Warehouse_Cloud_Administrator",
                    "display": "Data_Warehouse_Cloud_Administrator",
                    "primary": true
                },
                "targetPath": "$.roles[1]"
            }

 

What works with this:

If the user is assigned to one or both groups, they are successfully created in SAP Datasphere.
The corresponding profile (role) is also assigned.

What doesn’t work:

If I remove a group, the associated profile in SAP Datasphere is not removed.



Does anyone have an idea how to solve this?

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist + restricted keyfigure
entry.content:
hi,

we have the following usecase =>

Datasphere Analytical Datamodel

 - Invoice data

Story in SAC: (not an SAC Application)

  -  1 Inputcontrol: Fiscal Period (all periods from current Fiscal year + all periode from previous fiscalyear in the valuelist)

   - 1 table: with Keyfigure turnover (Selected Fiscal Period) 

my questions:

a.)  how to get the periods for the SAC Inputcontrol valuelist? in Stories not possible anmyore to make coding before starting like in  apps, with the "on startup" event?

b.) how to pass the selected Fiscalperiod to DSP that the calcaulation will be done in Datasphere?

     -  with  restricted keyfigure Turnover with restricted variable on Fiscal period ?  

thanks for hints

entry.title: How to see dimension with associations in datasphere without using analytics?
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a simple dimension built in datasphere and it has some associations, text and others and I want to check the data with the associations without having to build an Analytic model over it

The semantic type of the view in Dimension and is it exposed for consumption

Any ideas?

 

Shlomi

entry.title: Where does SAP Datasphere store the business names of columns for SQL access?
entry.content:
I crreated a database user to access data directly via SQL for an external system. It works but I only get the technical names for each column.

Where does SAP Datasphere store the texts for the business names exactly? I found several views that looked promising but none of them contained the business names:

If anybody knows more, please let me know!

Thanks, Alexander.

entry.title: error 314 numeric overflow for table containing value 1.0
entry.content:
Dear experts,
When I try to run a dataflow, I get the error below. Could you guide me on how to solve the issue ? 

Group messages:
Group: default; Messages: Graph failure: target1 failed with the following error:
General error;314 numeric overflow: Failed in "Column_Name" column with the value 1.000000000000000000
Process(es) terminated with error(s). restartOnFailure==false

In the data flow I want to run, data source contains "1.0" in the column (instead of "1.000000000000000000") and then converted to the local table in the target after projection.

Thanks!

entry.title: (Datasphere/SAC) Time Dimension attributes not visible in SAC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created an analytical model in Datasphere (DSP). In the underlying fact view, I have created a handful of associations, including an association with the time dimension table created for the space.

Enabling all of the attributes in the DSP Analytical model allows me to see and use them in the Analytical model Preview, SAC Data Analyzer, and in a Table Widget in a SAC story.

But alas! I need them in a chart, where they are not visible. Only the hierarchy I created in the time dimension is available when adding the time dimension to the chart.

entry.title: SAP CAP, HDI and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello collegues,

For a customer we are developing a SAP CAP application with Hana capabilities. Before this project I have always used HDI container active on the same subaccount to connect CAP with Hana.

But now, we have two subaccounts:

  • Development: we develop SAPUI5 and CAP applications. HDI container service is not active.
  • Datasphere: we have the Datasphere service active and instance running.

We need to connect CAP application with Datasphere. I have asked to active HDI container service in Development subaccount but the manager rejected it.

So, my question is... is it possible to connect from CAP to Datasphere without HDI container in Development subaccount?

If the answer is yet, is it right to do and how can be achieved?

Thank you very much in advance Community!!!

BR,

Manuel

entry.title: Knowledge sharing - SAP Multi-Client setup and experiences using SAC/Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi all you SAP gurus, 

Does anyone know of companies running a SAP muli-client setup combined with SAC and Datashere?

If yes, how did they accomplish the setup on SAS/SAP Datasphere side etc. in relation to spaces,  joint corporate reporting and so on?

Any comments are welcome 🙂

Thanks in advance,

Michael

May the SAP force be with you all ....

entry.title: Currency conversion insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Maybe I'm doing something wrong, but I am at a total loss currently. I have a TEST space and a PROD space and a SAP space. In the SAP space I have my currency conversion objects, which I have shared with both the TEST and PROD space using the currency conversion views creator built into SAP Datasphere. I have also created the currency conversion views from the SAP space in the TEST space and put them in a package that I import in the PROD space.

In the screenshots below you can see how I shared the currency conversion tables with the other space

And this is how I created the views from the SAP space in the TEST space.

Everything works as it should in the TEST space, but when I import all of my packages into the PROD space, I get a insufficient privilege error. I can fix this by basically deleting the currency conversion columns and creating them again, but if I import the package again because of changes in the TEST space, I have to do this all over again. So this isn't a long term solution.

Does anyone maybe know what I am doing wrong or how I can make sure the currency conversion doesnt break when I transport objects between spaces.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Analytical Model Performance Trace & PlanViz
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to analyze the Performance of an Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere to identify possible design issues. Therefore I follow the SAP Help documentation to extract the MDS Statement and generate the PlanViz File.

But I currently have the following problem:

  1. I execute the Model in SAC and retreive the MDS statement. Here I have a runtime of about ~40 seconds.
  2. Then I call generate the MDS statement with the CALL SYS.EXECUTE_MDS(...) statement. Here I have the behaviour that this is then generated in around ~1 second and the PlanViz is not reflecting the ~40 seconds runtime in the frontend.

My current assumption is that this is due to the MDS cache. But in the Database Console also cannot flush it, due to missing authorization. 

Does anybody has had similar issues or knows any best practices to generate a correct PlanViz out of an Analytical Model MDS statement?

Thank you for your input!

Regards

Christian

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Delta flow with aggregation
entry.content:
Hi all, 

we want to replicate a BW flow that from Datasource 0FI_AR_04 in delta loads DSO A.
from this DSO A the data loads with a delta DTP in another DSO B where the key figures are in sum with a part of the keys of DSO A. Below are the tables for the example.
it is necessary to replicate this flow in datasphere. We have created the tables ZA(DSO A) and ZB(DSO B) both with delta capture.

now SAP DSPH The flow from datasource to table ZA, works correctly because the key figures are aggregated by overwriting, but now there is the problem from ZA to ZB since in the transformation Flow it does not seem to be possible to aggregate the key figures by sum and it does not even aggregate by key since it returns an error on the unique key (see example in the table), how can we manage this type of flow on DSPH? is there a standard procedure or best case to follow?

error for sum aggregation

 

 

 

 

example aggregation flow in BW:

in DSPH doesn't work the collect for a part of the same table key before loading the data from ZA to target(ZB):

 

 

thanks.

entry.title: Alation HANA DB Connector in violation of HANA Runtime License
entry.content:
Alation is a market leader in the Data Catalog space.  They show up in any kind of web research with BW, ECC, and other SAP connectors.  All of those connectors are really the same, an ODBC Connection to the HANA Database.  

As DBA's we know that metadata scans at the HANA level will bear no real fruit.  We should also know, that the Runtime License for S/4HANA does not allow ODBC connections by third parties.  In a nutshell, there appears to be no real support for S/4HANA to be connected to Alation.

If your company is assessing Alation, be very specific in your challenges on whether they work with SAP.  

That said, does anyone know if the Data Catalog in Datasphere will be a connector of any type to Third Party solutions like Collibra, or Alation?

entry.title: Issue with Fiscal Week Configuration in SAC Planning Model
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on creating a Date dimension in a planning model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

I've successfully configured the fiscal year to start in May and to be labeled by the year in which it ends.

However, I need the fiscal week to start from the first Thursday of each month. Currently, the dropdown only allows selecting Saturday, Sunday, or Monday as the week start day.

Could anyone advise on how to achieve this or suggest a workaround?

Thanks in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand RISE with SAP

entry.title: How to Check View Counts for AM in sac add-in for excel
entry.content:
Hello.

User is looking up the AM created in datasphere through sac add-in for excel.

Is there an administrator menu where I can see how much each AM has been viewed in sac add-in for excel?

entry.title: How to get details of Users and their roles in ICM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Trying to build a report that shows the list of application users in ICM. I am tried joining tables: CSI_USER, CSI_USERGROUP and CSI_GROUP. But 'Roles' information related to users is missing. Is there any table(s) to get this info. Pls provide inputs on this. Thanks!

--

KRPK

SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management SAP Datasphere

entry.title: All leaf elements must be used as part of the association between dimension and hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi,

I get an error when I associate a graphical view with semantic type “Dimension”  with an “Hierarchy with directory”-GraphicalView

All leaf elements must be used as part of the association between dimension and hierarchy.

I use BW objects / tables: /BI0/MCS_ITEM, RSHIEDIR, /BI0/HCS_ITEM and  like described here:

Hierarchien aus SAP BW in Datasphere abbilden: So geht's

As 0CS_ITEM is compounded to 0CS_CHART, I have also created the columns CS_CHART and CS_ITEM. CS_ITEM no longer starts with “BN”, which semantically means the CS_CHART.

Hierarchy Settings (2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_01):

 

I have also tried further settings (2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02).

CS_ITEM and NODE_WO_COMPND (WO_COMPND = without compounding) don’t contain ‘BN’ which semantically means the 0CS_CHART.

 

In this case I get a different error:

"2_GV_CS_ITEM_01" - Hierarchy 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02 is incorrectly defined.

Compounded node "0CS_ITEM" is associated to non-compounded entity 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

Representative key must be set for the entity 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

I tried different combinations for representative key,

Compounded: NODEID/ HIEID, Representative: HIEID

Compounded: HIEID/ NODEID/ CS_CHART/ CS_ITEM, Representative: CS_ITEM

Compounded: NODEID/ CS_CHART/ CS_ITEM, Representative: CS_ITEM

As NODEID is defined as a child column under “Multiple hierarchy settings”, it must be a key column, otherwise there is an error

Child Column must be a key column for the entity "2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

Do you have any suggestions?

Best Regards

Nadine

entry.title: How to realize a profit and loss statement in a Datasphere analysis model
entry.content:
I am trying to display a profit and loss statement report in SAC with an analytical model defined in Datasphere, but account dimensions are not enough, I also need
formulas. I also need formulas for operating income, net income, etc.
How can I devise a way to express this?
I would appreciate it if someone could help me.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How can you determine what business content artefacts would be or has been updated?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Does Business Content updates, ACTUALLY update an original (i.e. overwrite), or are updates always new versions (i.e. SAP_xxxxxx_V2).

Let me take this example. "Finance Foundation for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud", what changes are made in version 1.6.1?

Ideally, I wish to pick and choose the artefacts that have been udpated? How can I see what updates are in this version?
